description: Shared Renovate preset for DPYC ecosystem repos. Tuned for LOW NOISE: one weekly batch, throttled PR volume, aggressively grouped, and settled-release-only. The ONLY thing that self-merges is the tollbooth-dpyc == pin (patch/minor) — and only where the repo grants the Renovate app a branch-protection bypass. Everything else waits for owner review by design (crypto/PII federation: a human sees every dependency change).

packageRules.description: SDK pin — the ONE thing that self-merges (via a per-repo Renovate branch-protection bypass). Patch/minor auto-merge on green CI; not delayed by minimumReleaseAge because we trust our own wheel immediately.
SDK major bumps — pin, always manual review (breaking changes).
All GitHub Actions bumps collapsed into ONE PR; owner reviews (only the SDK pin bypasses the money-gate).
Ignore Python 3.14 — coincurve/cffi not compatible yet.
Collapse all non-SDK Python dependency bumps into one PR.
Collapse all npm/frontend dependency bumps into one PR (tames the taxsort + excalibur churn).
